description: Payment demonstrates using the PaymentMethod union type.

currency.description: Currency is the payment currency code.

date.description: Date is when the payment occurred.. Must be an RFC3339 formatted date-time string (e.g., "2006-01-02T15:04:05Z07:00")

anyOf.description: CreditCard implements PaymentMethod for credit card payments.

cardNumber.description: CardNumber is the credit card number.

expiryMonth.description: ExpiryMonth is the month the card expires.

expiryYear.description: ExpiryYear is the year the card expires.

cvv.description: CVV is the card verification value.

anyOf.description: BankTransfer implements PaymentMethod for bank transfers.

accountNumber.description: AccountNumber is the bank account number.

routingNumber.description: RoutingNumber is the bank routing number.

bankName.description: BankName is the name of the bank.

anyOf.description: DigitalWallet implements PaymentMethod for digital wallet payments. This demonstrates using pointer receivers with interfaces.

provider.description: Provider is the wallet provider name (e.g., "PayPal", "Apple Pay").

phoneNumber.description: PhoneNumber is the associated phone number.
